scripts.check:env: if [ "$(uname)" != "Darwin" ]; then echo '跳过 @beeve/ios 环境检查：需要 macOS 与 Xcode'; exit 0; fi; xcodebuild -version && xcodebuild -showsdks | grep -E 'iphoneos|iphonesimulator'
scripts.build: if [ "$(uname)" != "Darwin" ]; then echo '跳过 @beeve/ios 构建：需要 macOS 与 Xcode'; exit 0; fi; xcodebuild -project BeeveIOS.xcodeproj -scheme BeeveIOS -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.clean: if [ "$(uname)" != "Darwin" ]; then echo '跳过 @beeve/ios 清理：需要 macOS 与 Xcode'; exit 0; fi; xcodebuild -project BeeveIOS.xcodeproj -scheme BeeveIOS clean
scripts.preview:open: if [ "$(uname)" != "Darwin" ]; then echo '跳过 @beeve/ios 预览打开：需要 macOS 与 Xcode'; exit 0; fi; xed -p BeeveIOS.xcodeproj BeeveIOS/App/RootTabView.swift
